calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paula Leibovitz for and with Nancy Dooley (Executor). Rosemary McGrew (Paralegal) also present.

Ms. Dooley stated that they filed a Request for Special Notice in the Alameda County probate matter and the two in San Francisco. Ms. Leibovitz stated that they collected a total of $9,500.00 from the Worker's Compensation matters, that the Decedent did minimal work on the probate matters, that the expense to collect on the probate matters far exceeded the benefit and that the Executor made sure the matters went back to the Client. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Aug-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
